priority: Deterministic LDAP facade and security-explicit backend gap
scope: Registered LDAP functions, classes, and stable constants
Request-local LDAP\Connection handles without implicit network access
Option set/get behavior for common LDAP and TLS policy options
Error state through ldap_errno, ldap_error, and ldap_err2str
Deterministic empty LDAP\Result handles for read/list/search traversal
Explicit failure for bind, mutation, compare, extended operations, and TLS
non_scope: SASL, referrals, controls parsing, paged results, and TLS handshakes
next_step: Add an opt-in LDAP backend and live DSN-gated PHPTs before promoting php-src LDAP integration tests.
